subcodes.first_line: O thou tender plant in the Garden of God! Happy art thou, Happy art thou! That thou art nurtured and developed by the outpouring of the Cloud
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تازه نهال بوستان الهی خوشا خوشا که از فیض سحاب هدایت کبری نشو و نما نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @thankfulness; gratitude
